message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam class {
  BackgroundColor #F2F2F2
  BorderColor #333333
}

class "plugin_translation\n((Translations))" as plugin_translation {
  __label__ string
  description longText
  manufacturerLink string
  supportLink string
  changelog json
  customFields customFields
  __createdAt__ createdAt
  __updatedAt__ updatedAt
  **pluginId** foreignKey
  **languageId** foreignKey
}

class "plugin\n(Plugin)" as plugin {
  **id** id
  __baseClass__ string
  __name__ string
  composerName string
  __autoload__ json
  active bool
  managedByComposer bool
  path string
  author string
  copyright string
  license string
  __version__ string
  upgradeVersion string
  installedAt date
  upgradedAt date
  iconRaw blob
  icon string
  label translated
  description translated
  manufacturerLink translated
  supportLink translated
  changelog translated
  customFields translated
  __createdAt__ createdAt
  __updatedAt__ updatedAt
  translated json
}

class "language" as language
class "payment_method" as payment_method

plugin_translation --> plugin
plugin_translation --> language
plugin --> payment_method
@enduml
